title: For Programmers
description: Editors, shells, project tooling, Git, containers, and daily dev ergonomics.

prompts.label: Dev workstation
prompts.prompt: Set up my daily coding terminal: enable zsh, starship, direnv with nix-direnv, git with SSH commit signing, lazygit, fzf, ripgrep, fd, jq, and Ghostty with a readable theme.

prompts.label: Emacs daemon
prompts.prompt: Set up Doom Emacs or Spacemacs as an Emacs daemon, make emacsclient my default editor, and add a rotating daily shell MOTD with useful Nix and macOS tips.

prompts.label: Polyglot projects
prompts.prompt: Create a project workstation profile with uv, mise, Node, Go, Rust, Docker CLI contexts, k9s, kubecolor, and a direnv template for new repos.

title: For Streamers
description: Recording, streaming, ingest tunnels, capture boxes, and stream-room utilities.

prompts.label: OBS setup
prompts.prompt: Install OBS Studio, Streamlink, yt-dlp, Twitch TUI, Discord, and a launchd login agent that prepares a recording folder and opens my stream checklist.

prompts.label: Capture box
prompts.prompt: Set up a two-machine recording workflow: enable Tailscale, add SSH shortcuts to the capture box, and create a boot or login tunnel for the ingest server.

prompts.label: Linux stream rig
prompts.prompt: For NixOS hosts in this flake, enable OBS Studio, GPU Screen Recorder, PipeWire/JACK, and GoXLR Utility for a dedicated streaming rig.

title: For Homelab Admins
description: Tunnels, SSH profiles, network tools, local services, and remote access.

prompts.label: Boot tunnel
prompts.prompt: Tunnel a local service automatically on boot with Tailscale or cloudflared, add a launchd daemon, and document the local URL in my shell login message.

prompts.label: SSH homelab
prompts.prompt: Set up SSH profiles for my homelab machines with ControlMaster, keepalives, known-hosts hashing, and short aliases for each server.

prompts.label: Ops toolbelt
prompts.prompt: Install and configure lightweight ops tools: k9s, kubecolor, jq, yq, dig, iperf3, nmap, and a quick network diagnostics shell alias.

title: For Security-Minded Users
description: Touch ID, firewall policy, SSH hygiene, certificates, and encrypted secrets.

prompts.label: Harden sudo
prompts.prompt: Enable Touch ID and Apple Watch for sudo, turn on the application firewall with stealth mode, and keep downloaded-app quarantine enabled.

prompts.label: SSH hygiene
prompts.prompt: Harden my SSH client config with hashed known hosts, short aliases, agent settings, and separate match blocks for work and personal hosts.

prompts.label: Secret recipients
prompts.prompt: Add SOPS/age secrets support for API keys and SSH deploy keys, with clear recipients and no plaintext secrets in the repo.

title: For Designers
description: Creative apps, fonts, screenshots, window management, and visual polish.

prompts.label: Design kit
prompts.prompt: Install design apps and fonts: Figma, Blender, ImageOptim, SF Mono or Nerd Fonts; set screenshots to ~/Pictures/Screenshots as PNG without shadows; show Finder path and status bars.

prompts.label: Window workflow
prompts.prompt: Set up a design-friendly window workflow with AeroSpace or yabai, Raycast, Rectangle, clean hotkeys, and sensible Dock and Stage Manager defaults.

prompts.label: Terminal theme
prompts.prompt: Give my terminal and CLI tools a consistent theme: Ghostty, bat, vivid, dircolors, fzf, and a clean prompt that works in light and dark macOS modes.

title: For Writers and Researchers
description: Notes, citations, PDF workflows, study tools, and low-distraction defaults.

prompts.label: Research suite
prompts.prompt: Set up Obsidian vault defaults, pandoc, TeX Live, Zotero, Anki, citation styles, and a clean PDF reading workflow.

prompts.label: Daily writing
prompts.prompt: Create a daily writing setup: a launchd reminder, a notes backup job, a distraction-free shell command, and Finder defaults that keep drafts easy to find.

prompts.label: Focus defaults
prompts.prompt: Tune macOS for focused writing: disable auto-correct surprises, use expanded save dialogs, hide desktop clutter, and put screenshots in a dedicated folder.

title: For Laptop Nomads
description: Travel-safe networking, battery behavior, remote access, and replacement-Mac parity.

prompts.label: Travel profile
prompts.prompt: Create a travel laptop profile: enable firewall stealth mode, Tailscale, SSH aliases, stricter sleep settings, and a quick status command for network and battery health.

prompts.label: Presentation mode
prompts.prompt: Add a presentation mode profile that keeps the display awake on AC power, disables notification-prone startup apps, and adds a one-command toggle.

prompts.label: Replacement Mac
prompts.prompt: Capture my current non-default macOS settings, Homebrew apps, shell tools, and launchd items into the flake so a replacement Mac feels identical.

title: For Gamers
description: Game launchers, remote play, Discord, Linux gaming hosts, and controller utilities.

prompts.label: Mac gaming
prompts.prompt: Install my Mac gaming basics: Steam, Discord, Prism Launcher, Moonlight, controller utilities, and a Finder folder for game captures.

prompts.label: NixOS gaming box
prompts.prompt: For my NixOS gaming box, enable Steam, Gamescope, Gamemode, Sunshine remote play, and Prism Launcher with sensible firewall openings.

prompts.label: Remote play
prompts.prompt: Set up remote play between my gaming box and Mac with Tailscale, Moonlight/Sunshine, wake-on-LAN where supported, and a shell command to connect.
